commands.name: login-rug
commands.title: University of Groningen Login
commands.description: Save RUG credentials and create a Brightspace session

commands.name: dashboard
commands.title: Dashboard
commands.description: Show Brightspace updates, due work, feedback, and shortcuts

commands.name: my-courses
commands.title: Courses
commands.description: Show enrolled courses and browse content

commands.name: announcements-menu-bar
commands.title: Announcements
commands.subtitle: Brightspace
commands.description: Show new Brightspace announcements in the menu bar

preferences.name: announcementRefreshInterval
preferences.title: Refresh Interval
preferences.description: How often the command should fetch Brightspace announcements in the background.

preferences.name: announcementTitleMode
preferences.title: Menu Bar Title
preferences.description: Controls the text shown next to the menu bar icon.

preferences.name: announcementNotificationMode
preferences.title: New Announcement Alerts
preferences.description: Controls what happens when background refresh finds new announcements.

preferences.name: announcementIconMode
preferences.title: Menu Bar Icon
preferences.description: Controls the normal menu bar icon.

preferences.name: announcementBellMode
preferences.title: Bell Icon Behavior
preferences.description: Controls how unread updates change the selected menu bar icon.

preferences.name: showCourseAnnouncements
preferences.title: Announcement Types
preferences.description: Show normal course announcements.
preferences.label: Course announcements

preferences.name: showPinnedAnnouncements
preferences.description: Show pinned announcements.
preferences.label: Pinned announcements

preferences.name: showGlobalAnnouncements
preferences.description: Show global announcements.
preferences.label: Global announcements

preferences.name: showAttachmentAnnouncements
preferences.description: Show announcements that include attachments.
preferences.label: Announcements with attachments

preferences.name: showGradeUpdates
preferences.description: Show recent visible grade updates.
preferences.label: Grade updates

preferences.name: gradeValueMode
preferences.title: Grade Display
preferences.description: Controls whether menu items and alerts reveal the actual grade value.

commands.name: discussions
commands.title: Discussions
commands.description: Browse course discussion forums, topics, and posts

commands.name: checklists
commands.title: Checklists
commands.description: Browse course checklists, categories, and tasks

commands.name: course-content
commands.title: Course Content
commands.description: Compatibility entry for merged course browser

commands.name: assignments
commands.title: Assignments
commands.description: Show assignment folders and due dates

commands.name: quizzes
commands.title: Quizzes
commands.description: Show quizzes, availability, and due dates

preferences.name: tenantUrl
preferences.title: Tenant URL
preferences.description: Brightspace tenant URL, for example https://brightspace.rug.nl

preferences.name: cookieHeader
preferences.title: Cookie Header
preferences.description: Authenticated Brightspace Cookie header value from a browser session

preferences.name: bearerToken
preferences.title: Bearer Token
preferences.description: Optional OAuth access token. Used instead of cookies when present.

preferences.name: lpVersion
preferences.title: LP API Version
preferences.description: Optional override. Leave empty to discover from /d2l/api/versions/.

preferences.name: leVersion
preferences.title: LE API Version
preferences.description: Optional override. Leave empty to discover from /d2l/api/versions/.

preferences.name: acronymCleanupRegex
preferences.title: Acronym Cleanup Regex
preferences.description: Regex removed before automatic course acronym generation. Default removes square-bracket semester labels.

preferences.name: showContentDueTags
preferences.title: Content Tags
preferences.description: Show due date tags in course content lists.
preferences.label: Due dates

preferences.name: showContentCompletionTags
preferences.description: Show completed and incomplete tags in course content lists.
preferences.label: Completion state

preferences.name: showContentExemptionTags
preferences.description: Show exempt tags in course content lists.
preferences.label: Exemptions

preferences.name: showContentAvailabilityTags
preferences.description: Show hidden and locked tags in course content lists.
preferences.label: Hidden and locked

preferences.name: showContentTypeTags
preferences.description: Show content type tags like PDF, Page, Stream, and External.
preferences.label: Content type

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
